    s.usd                /S1

Time Offsets:
    root.usd             /S1             root       (offset=0.00, scale=1.00)
        s.usd                            sublayer   (offset=10.00, scale=2.00)
        ss.usd                           sublayer   (offset=30.00, scale=4.00)

        ss_12fps.usd                     sublayer   (offset=30.00, scale=8.00)
